/bin/bash -lc "if [ -f docs/workflows.md ]; then sed -n '1,180p' docs/workflows.md; else printf 'MISSING docs/workflows.md\\n'; fi"
item.aggregated_output:
# Customer Fixture Workflow Guide

## Customer-project portability

Public skills operate in customer-project mode by default.

Use project-local artifacts when present and relevant.

Do not require RigorLoop repository-internal specs, docs, root governance, reports, or follow-up files in this customer fixture.

When local guidance is absent, use portable defaults where safe and block on ambiguity where no safe default exists.

## Artifact locations

| Artifact | Location |
|---|---|
| specs | `specs/` |
| plans | `docs/plans/` |
| change root | `docs/changes/<change-id>/` |

item.text:
- evidence used: user request; provided `$spec` skill instructions; local `docs/workflows.md` artifact table showing specs belong in `specs/`
- whether local `docs/workflows.md` was used: yes, only for artifact placement
- portable default or ambiguity behavior: use portable default spec structure from `$spec`; no blocker because behavior and placement are clear enough
- attempted reliance on absent RigorLoop internals: no
- proposed spec path: `specs/greeting-suffix-option.md`
- three requirement IDs:
  - R1. The app MUST allow a configured greeting suffix to be appended to generated greetings.
  - R2. The app MUST preserve existing greeting output when no suffix is configured.
  - R3. The app MUST handle an empty suffix as equivalent to no suffix.
